name: Baked Stuffed Fish II
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Can sliced mushrooms, broiled in butter, undrained
6 ounces Package frozen king crab meat, defrosted
3/4 cup Chicken broth or clam juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish and set aside.
2. In a medium-sized heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds or until melted. Add chopped onion and green pepper. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until onion and pepper are tender.
3. Add mushrooms, seasoned dressing, and crab meat. Gently toss to combine.
4. Add chicken broth or clam juice and stir to combine. Stuff each fish with some of the mixture.
5. Secure openings with string, toothpicks, or small metal skewers.
6. Place stuffed fish in prepared baking dish. Cover with clear plastic wrap and heat for 10 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork. Let fish stand, covered, at room temperature for 2 minutes to finish cooking.
